'''Urlor Sette''' was a ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' prisoner around the same [[Time/Legends|time]] as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. A large [[Gender/Legends|man]], he had lost part of one [[Limb/Legends|hand]], leaving him effectively crippled. He was a personal assistant to fellow prisoner [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|General]]. During his time at ''Lusankya'', Sette helped Corran Horn escape—the first person to have done so. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Urlor died at a party thrown in honor of Rogue Squadron and the defeat of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] after Corran Horn said his name, thanks to a "killbox" implanted in him by a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Ysanne Isard]].
